testcase.name: submitReturns200WithOperationOutcome
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-12T11:29:52.401-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [io.simintero.fhir.PasProviderTest]: PasProviderTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-12T11:29:52.401-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration io.simintero.fhir.FhirFacadeApplication for test class io.simintero.fhir.PasProviderTest 2026-06-12T11:29:52.410-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [ main] ca.uhn.fhir.context.FhirContext : Creating new FHIR context for FHIR version [R4] 2026-06-12T11:29:52.501-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [o-auto-1-exec-6] io.simintero.fhir.pas.PasProvider : IntakeCommand forwarded to intake service. channel=PAS

testcase.name: submitOperationOutcomeContainsTrackingNote
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-12T11:29:52.585-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [ main] ca.uhn.fhir.context.FhirContext : Creating new FHIR context for FHIR version [R4] 2026-06-12T11:29:52.611-05:00 INFO 59846 --- [o-auto-1-exec-9] io.simintero.fhir.pas.PasProvider : IntakeCommand forwarded to intake service. channel=PAS
